races.name: Join The Johnson White Racing Syndicate Novices' Hurdle (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
FALLS OF ACHARN has been highly tried since making a winning hurdles bow at Musselburgh earlier this year and will find this company more to his liking. He can get back on the scoreboard. Sinchi Roca looks the obvious danger on form, whilst Ettore should know more about this discipline after his Newbury debut and is also of interest.

  1. FALLS OF ACHARN
  2. SINCHI ROCA (IRE)
  3. ETTORE (IRE)
races.verdict_text: FALLS OF ACHARN has been highly tried since making a winning hurdles bow at Musselburgh earlier this year and will find this company more to his liking. He can get back on the scoreboard. Sinchi Roca looks the obvious danger on form, whilst Ettore should know more about this discipline after his Newbury debut and is also of interest.

races.name: Experience The Thrill With HotToTrot Racing Mares' Handicap Hurdle
races.verdict:
This can go to LADY CARO, who ran a cracker here earlier this month and remains fairly treated. Newmill Getaway and Kantagua Du Large rate the principal dangers.

  1. LADY CARO (IRE)
  2. NEWMILL GETAWAY (IRE)
  3. KANTAGUA DU LARGE (FR)
races.verdict_text: This can go to LADY CARO, who ran a cracker here earlier this month and remains fairly treated. Newmill Getaway and Kantagua Du Large rate the principal dangers.

races.name: 4Racing Owners Club Charitable Syndicates Handicap Hurdle
races.verdict:
ST LUKES CHELSEA went close when third over C&D 15 days ago and he can build on that effort to gain a breakthrough success. He gets the vote ahead of Thistle Be The One, who was runner-up twice here last season, while Raging Al could still have more to offer in this sphere.

  1. ST LUKES CHELSEA
  2. THISTLE BE THE ONE (IRE)
  3. RAGING AL (IRE)
races.verdict_text: ST LUKES CHELSEA went close when third over C&D 15 days ago and he can build on that effort to gain a breakthrough success. He gets the vote ahead of Thistle Be The One, who was runner-up twice here last season, while Raging Al could still have more to offer in this sphere.

races.name: Kayley Woollacott Syndicates & Blackmore Racing Club Handicap Chase (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
WICKED THOUGHTS looked a natural when making a winning debut in this sphere over C&D under similar conditions on his return in November so is well worth another chance having disappointed on testing ground subsequently. Ede'iffs Rock arrives on the back of a career-best win over C&D so looks the obvious threat.

  1. WICKED THOUGHTS (IRE)
  2. EDE'IFFS ROCK
  3. GOOD FRIDAY FAIRY (IRE)
races.verdict_text: WICKED THOUGHTS looked a natural when making a winning debut in this sphere over C&D under similar conditions on his return in November so is well worth another chance having disappointed on testing ground subsequently. Ede'iffs Rock arrives on the back of a career-best win over C&D so looks the obvious threat.

races.name: Racehorse Ownership From 25 At racingclub.com Handicap Hurdle
races.verdict:
The progressive KHAFRE can make a winning start in handicaps off what looks a fair opening mark. Knock Off Soxs and Treasure Planet are also going the right way so are feared most.

  1. KHAFRE (FR)
  2. KNOCK OFF SOXS (IRE)
  3. TREASURE PLANET (IRE)
races.verdict_text: The progressive KHAFRE can make a winning start in handicaps off what looks a fair opening mark. Knock Off Soxs and Treasure Planet are also going the right way so are feared most.

races.name: Crest Racing Mares' Handicap Chase
races.verdict:
A chance is taken on chase debutante PRAIRIE QUEEN, who was spring heeled when a good third over hurdles off this mark at Hereford and hopes can be high that she will take to fences at the first attempt. Bobbi's Beauty has winning form round here and is feared most ahead of Ryder's Rock.

  1. PRAIRIE QUEEN
  2. BOBBI'S BEAUTY (IRE)
  3. RYDER'S ROCK
races.verdict_text: A chance is taken on chase debutante PRAIRIE QUEEN, who was spring heeled when a good third over hurdles off this mark at Hereford and hopes can be high that she will take to fences at the first attempt. Bobbi's Beauty has winning form round here and is feared most ahead of Ryder's Rock.

races.name: South West Rail Solutions Open NH Flat Race (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
CREST OF ARMS shaped notably well in a listed event at Cheltenham on New Year's Day and has to be considered the one to beat back down in grade. However, strong market support for newcomer Artaban would need taking seriously.

  1. CREST OF ARMS
  2. ARTABAN (FR)
  3. ARMS PARK
races.verdict_text: CREST OF ARMS shaped notably well in a listed event at Cheltenham on New Year's Day and has to be considered the one to beat back down in grade. However, strong market support for newcomer Artaban would need taking seriously.

races.name: Ladies Day Sunday 16th August Handicap Chase (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
SMURFETTE showed a good attitude when resuming winning ways over 3m here 3 weeks ago and a 3-lb rise on the back of that shouldn't prevent her going well again. Copshill Lad and Icaque de L'isle will each find this less demanding than their most recent assignment and can provide chief resistance.

  1. SMURFETTE
  2. COPSHILL LAD (IRE)
  3. ICAQUE DE L'ISLE (FR)
races.verdict_text: SMURFETTE showed a good attitude when resuming winning ways over 3m here 3 weeks ago and a 3-lb rise on the back of that shouldn't prevent her going well again. Copshill Lad and Icaque de L'isle will each find this less demanding than their most recent assignment and can provide chief resistance.

races.name: Book Your Party At Southwell Racecourse Novices' Handicap Chase
races.verdict:
SHADOWFAX OF ROHAN found only one who continues to progress too strong on his most recent start at Catterick 3 weeks ago and, still very much unexposed as a chaser, he makes plenty of appeal from the same mark. Classical Sting can emerge as the lead danger, ahead of Catchim, who has been given a break ahead of this.

  1. SHADOWFAX OF ROHAN (IRE)
  2. CLASSICAL STING
  3. CATCHIM (IRE)
races.verdict_text: SHADOWFAX OF ROHAN found only one who continues to progress too strong on his most recent start at Catterick 3 weeks ago and, still very much unexposed as a chaser, he makes plenty of appeal from the same mark. Classical Sting can emerge as the lead danger, ahead of Catchim, who has been given a break ahead of this.

races.name: Southwell Open Maiden NH Flat Race (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
TANDY'S BRIDGE proved a major let-down on first outing for Tom Ellis at Warwick in December but is well worth another chance based on the strength of his debut form. Indulto Rouge will find this more suitable back down in grade, while L'amalric is an interesting Rules newcomer on pedigree, for all that he's not exactly pulled up any trees in points.

  1. TANDY'S BRIDGE (IRE)
  2. INDULTO ROUGE (FR)
  3. L'AMALRIC (FR)
races.verdict_text: TANDY'S BRIDGE proved a major let-down on first outing for Tom Ellis at Warwick in December but is well worth another chance based on the strength of his debut form. Indulto Rouge will find this more suitable back down in grade, while L'amalric is an interesting Rules newcomer on pedigree, for all that he's not exactly pulled up any trees in points.

races.name: Free Bets On attheraces.com Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle
races.verdict:
PECKFORTON HILLS has improved since switching to handicap company and his bumper form provides hope for better still now stepping up to 3m for the first time, so he appeals as the most persuasive option. Jack The Savage remains well treated on old form after ending a long losing spell at Hereford recently, while Broderick shouldn't be written off completely for all that he disappointed on most recent outing.

  1. PECKFORTON HILLS (IRE)
  2. JACK THE SAVAGE
  3. BRODERICK (IRE)
races.verdict_text: PECKFORTON HILLS has improved since switching to handicap company and his bumper form provides hope for better still now stepping up to 3m for the first time, so he appeals as the most persuasive option. Jack The Savage remains well treated on old form after ending a long losing spell at Hereford recently, while Broderick shouldn't be written off completely for all that he disappointed on most recent outing.

races.name: Easter Sunday Family Fun Day Novices' Hurdle (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
It's hard to look beyond HILLBERRY HILL, who was successful in the second of his 2 starts for Margaret Mullins in Ireland and looks sure to progress for his new yard. The Flier Begley isn't getting any younger but he's the conceivable danger to the selection, for all that Tombereau showed some promise over C&D last time.

  1. HILLBERRY HILL (IRE)
  2. THE FLIER BEGLEY (IRE)
  3. TOMBEREAU (IRE)
races.verdict_text: It's hard to look beyond HILLBERRY HILL, who was successful in the second of his 2 starts for Margaret Mullins in Ireland and looks sure to progress for his new yard. The Flier Begley isn't getting any younger but he's the conceivable danger to the selection, for all that Tombereau showed some promise over C&D last time.

races.name: Join Southwell Golf Club Handicap Hurdle
races.verdict:
MOAB performed with credit, despite the drop back to around 17f counting against him, at Exeter recently and he is taken to deservedly open his hurdles account. Next on the list is Karton Plein, who arguably produced his best effort yet when third at Lingfield and he's lurking on a fairly appealing mark. Codetalker, Fine Casting and Sutherland all have claims, too.

  1. MOAB (IRE)
  2. KARTON PLEIN (FR)
  3. CODETALKER
races.verdict_text: MOAB performed with credit, despite the drop back to around 17f counting against him, at Exeter recently and he is taken to deservedly open his hurdles account. Next on the list is Karton Plein, who arguably produced his best effort yet when third at Lingfield and he's lurking on a fairly appealing mark. Codetalker, Fine Casting and Sutherland all have claims, too.

races.name: Visit The Bistro In Seasons Restaurant Novices' Limited Handicap Hurdle
races.verdict:
PARISH STAR disappointed on her hat-trick attempt at Carlisle but was a stylish winner over C&D the time before so is worth another chance back from a short break. Ever Ready and Feet On The Ground head the dangers.

  1. PARISH STAR (IRE)
  2. EVER READY
  3. FEET ON THE GROUND (IRE)
races.verdict_text: PARISH STAR disappointed on her hat-trick attempt at Carlisle but was a stylish winner over C&D the time before so is worth another chance back from a short break. Ever Ready and Feet On The Ground head the dangers.

races.name: Daily Profit Boosts At betmgm.co.uk Handicap (Div 1)
races.verdict:
WORLINGTON was well held in a trio of quick-fire runs in maiden/novice company last year but this well-bred sort firmly appeals as the type to do better now handicapping following a break (also gelded) so he gets the nod, with confidence behind him in the betting bolstering the view. Quick Turn and Lapidarist are others expected to be in the mix.

  1. WORLINGTON
  2. QUICK TURN (FR)
  3. LAPIDARIST
races.verdict_text: WORLINGTON was well held in a trio of quick-fire runs in maiden/novice company last year but this well-bred sort firmly appeals as the type to do better now handicapping following a break (also gelded) so he gets the nod, with confidence behind him in the betting bolstering the view. Quick Turn and Lapidarist are others expected to be in the mix.

races.name: Daily Profit Boosts At betmgm.co.uk Handicap (Div 2)
races.verdict:
SORTED has improved switched to handicaps in recent weeks, just failing having been forced wider than the winner when runner-up over C&D 8 days ago. He can confirm recent promise and open his account. Angry Ant fared better than previously here last time and along with Lexington Express, heads the dangers.

  1. SORTED (IRE)
  2. ANGRY ANT (USA)
  3. LEXINGTON EXPRESS (IRE)
races.verdict_text: SORTED has improved switched to handicaps in recent weeks, just failing having been forced wider than the winner when runner-up over C&D 8 days ago. He can confirm recent promise and open his account. Angry Ant fared better than previously here last time and along with Lexington Express, heads the dangers.

races.name: Join The Midnite Movement Handicap
races.verdict:
HENERY HAWK wasn't able to reel in Kento in a C&D handicap earlier this month but he enjoys a 3 lb pull at the weights with Tony Carrol's charge and is taken to emerge on top this time. Kento should again be in the mix but if My Genghis gets away on terms he may prove to be the main danger.

  1. HENERY HAWK
  2. MY GENGHIS
  3. KENTO
races.verdict_text: HENERY HAWK wasn't able to reel in Kento in a C&D handicap earlier this month but he enjoys a 3 lb pull at the weights with Tony Carrol's charge and is taken to emerge on top this time. Kento should again be in the mix but if My Genghis gets away on terms he may prove to be the main danger.

races.name: Create Your Bet Builders At Midnite Maiden Stakes (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
ROYAL STANDARD ought to have more to offer yet and hails from a yard in fine form. He can get off the mark. Chelmsford runner-up Montevetro looks the obvious danger.

  1. ROYAL STANDARD (IRE)
  2. MONTEVETRO (IRE)
  3. STEPANOV (IRE)
races.verdict_text: ROYAL STANDARD ought to have more to offer yet and hails from a yard in fine form. He can get off the mark. Chelmsford runner-up Montevetro looks the obvious danger.

races.name: Midnite, Building The Future Of Betting Classified Stakes (Div 1)
races.verdict:
OPTIMISTIC has taken his form up a notch this year and, with the potential of more still to offer after only 5 starts, he could be ready to open his account this time around. Flicka's Girl arrives in good heart and is feared most, ahead of Autumn Angel.

  1. OPTIMISTIC
  2. FLICKA'S GIRL
  3. AUTUMN ANGEL (IRE)
races.verdict_text: OPTIMISTIC has taken his form up a notch this year and, with the potential of more still to offer after only 5 starts, he could be ready to open his account this time around. Flicka's Girl arrives in good heart and is feared most, ahead of Autumn Angel.

races.name: Midnite, Building The Future Of Betting Classified Stakes (Div 2)
races.verdict:
DR ALI wasted no time getting back to form and went down fighting when runner up over C&D 2 weeks ago. Well drawn, he can make another bold bid in this groove. Port Hedland, Tommytwohoots and Black Cab are a trio of others to consider.

  1. DR ALI (IRE)
  2. PORT HEDLAND
  3. TOMMYTWOHOOTS
races.verdict_text: DR ALI wasted no time getting back to form and went down fighting when runner up over C&D 2 weeks ago. Well drawn, he can make another bold bid in this groove. Port Hedland, Tommytwohoots and Black Cab are a trio of others to consider.

races.name: Midnite: Built For 2026 Not 2006 Handicap
races.verdict:
AMERICAN BAY made a pleasing return to action over C&D recently and is the percentage call to come out on top from the same mark. Smooth Silesie and Mr Lightside head the opposition.

  1. AMERICAN BAY
  2. SMOOTH SILESIE (IRE)
  3. MR LIGHTSIDE (IRE)
races.verdict_text: AMERICAN BAY made a pleasing return to action over C&D recently and is the percentage call to come out on top from the same mark. Smooth Silesie and Mr Lightside head the opposition.

races.name: Midnite Aint Your Grandads Bookie Novice Stakes (GBB Race)
races.verdict:
TIME TO TAKE OFF left the impression she will go on to better things when making a winning debut at Nottingham in October and looks the one to beat. Newcastle scorer Merlier is feared most.

  1. TIME TO TAKE OFF (IRE)
  2. MERLIER (IRE)
  3. BURDETT ESTATE (IRE)
races.verdict_text: TIME TO TAKE OFF left the impression she will go on to better things when making a winning debut at Nottingham in October and looks the one to beat. Newcastle scorer Merlier is feared most.

races.name: Win 250,000 With BetMGM's Golden Goals Handicap
races.verdict:
PANAMA BLACK's latest third at Southwell was arguably a career-best effort so he could be ready to strike. Helm Rock should strip fitter for his comeback run, while Farasi Lane can be expected to bounce back.

  1. PANAMA BLACK (IRE)
  2. HELM ROCK
  3. FARASI LANE (IRE)
races.verdict_text: PANAMA BLACK's latest third at Southwell was arguably a career-best effort so he could be ready to strike. Helm Rock should strip fitter for his comeback run, while Farasi Lane can be expected to bounce back.
